creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Someone else has submitted a lynx-current update in ports/12338 that takes 
lynx to 2.8.3.  Since your pr (Chris) was only a straightforward "change 
version numbers and md5"-style upgrade, I'm closing it and leaving 
ports/12338 in its place.  [This pr, ports/11317 only upgrades to lynx- 
lynx-2.8.2pl25, not 2.8.3].
